_meta.name: C track 공유 보드 — anima ↔ hexa-lang 세션 상호 교환 SSOT
_meta.purpose: 두 세션이 독립으로 C 트랙 작업 중 — 충돌 방지 + 진행상황 동기화

owners.anima_session: anima 의식 엔진 작업 — alm/clm consciousness roadmap 갱신

rules: claim 후 작업 — 다른 세션이 동일 item claim 시 경고
progress 단계: planned → claimed → in_progress → done | blocked
done 시 evidence (commit hash / before-after metric) 필수

C2.title: layer-level fused FFI (per-layer bulk call)
C2.evidence: fused FFI 설계 + ffi_fused_layer.hexa + C stub 작성 시작

C3.title: stage0 PBV leak 근본 fix (24h stability test)
C3.evidence: Root cause = stage0 IndexAssign rebuild-via-push at 3 sites (NK_ASSIGN, AssignStmt, CompoundAssign) in self/hexa_full.hexa lines 6485/7136/7251. Fix applied in /Users/ghost/Dev/hexa-lang/self/hexa_full.hexa (uncommitted, hexa-lang owns commit), build/hexa_stage0 rebuilt OK. pbv_leak_repro STEPS=50: 2214MB→124MB (17.9x), STEPS=500: 305MB. Writeup docs/pbv-leak-root-cause.md, state shared/state/c3_pbv_leak_fix_20260416.json, regression test experiments/pbv_leak_fix_verify.hexa.

metrics.gain_pct: 17.9x RSS reduction at STEPS=50; isolate C 94.9x

follow_up: hexa-lang session: commit the fix in self/hexa_full.hexa + rebuild stage0 binary on canonical branch
24h CLM stability soak with the fixed binary (the actual board criterion)
secondary leak: ~1.1 KB per while-iter base arithmetic (no arrays). 1000 iters → 2.3 GB. Not in IndexAssign — likely env_push/pop or val_float allocation reclamation. Suggest new C12 item.

C4.title: CUDA fused mega-kernels + bf16 Tensor Core (H100 MFU 27→60%)

C6.title: hxblas + libhxvdsp Linux 포팅
C6.evidence: Mac baseline 256²16.8x/512²59.8x PASS, Linux .c+build script+bench ready for H100 pod, commit 2029844

C8.title: Flash Attention hexa native
C8.evidence: anima-engines/flash_attn.hexa (CPU FP32 reference, tiled online softmax FA-2 fwd+bwd, 7/7 correctness cases PASS at machine epsilon 9.99e-16) + anima-engines/flash_attn_cuda.hexa (CUDA kernel strings + NVRTC FFI launchers flash_attn_fwd_gpu/flash_attn_bwd_gpu, parses on Mac, awaits GPU host run); state JSON shared/state/c8_flash_attn_native_20260416.json

metrics.before: L*L softmax mat materialised, OOM at 7B d=4096 S>=2k
metrics.after: tiled online-softmax, no L*L mat (reference verified)

follow_up: GPU host run of flash_attn_init() + flash_attn_fwd_gpu correctness vs CPU reference
bf16 + Tensor Core wmma rewrite for full FA-2 peak (currently FP32, ~30% peak)
tiled bwd kernel (current bwd is correct but uses 1 row/thread, ~2x slower than tiled FA-2 bwd)

C9.title: Zero-3 / FSDP hexa native
C9.evidence: training/fsdp_shard.hexa (551 LOC) + training/nccl_ffi.hexa (183 LOC stub) + training/test_fsdp_shard.hexa (380 LOC, 34/34 PASS on darwin arm64) + shared/state/c9_fsdp_native_20260416.json. Multi-rank NCCL wiring TODO C9-MR-1..6 (~17h)

metrics.after: world=1 no-op verified bit-identical; world=2 design ready for NCCL wiring

C11.title: async checkpoint save (학습 non-blocking)
C11.evidence: background save 설계 — 기존 ckpt 경로 스캔 중

owner=anima_session, FlashAttention native (CPU FP32 reference + CUDA NVRTC kernel stub)

anima-engines/flash_attn.hexa (7/7 cases PASS at 9.99e-16 vs standard attention) + anima-engines/flash_attn_cuda.hexa (NVRTC kernels parses OK on Mac, ready for GPU host). state JSON shared/state/c8_flash_attn_native_20260416.json. Follow-up: GPU host correctness run + bf16 wmma rewrite + tiled bwd.

Root cause = stage0 IndexAssign rebuild-via-push at 3 sites in self/hexa_full.hexa (lines 6485/7136/7251). Fix replaces ~16-line rebuild loop with 3-line in-place hexa_array_set, all sites. build/hexa_stage0 rebuilt OK. pbv_leak_repro STEPS=50: 2214MB→124MB (17.9x), STEPS=500: 305MB. Writeup docs/pbv-leak-root-cause.md. State shared/state/c3_pbv_leak_fix_20260416.json. Test experiments/pbv_leak_fix_verify.hexa. Awaits hexa-lang session commit + 24h soak.
